detailed_execution_specification: This dataset requires only structural cleaning and no structural reshaping. The execution engine will honour the execution_order entries and enabled flags declared in the JSON specification, so the implementation order is fixed and no transformation is inferred or skipped silently. Preprocessing shall begin by identifying duplicate observations using the complete observation composed of Date, BDI_Close, BDI_High and BDI_Low. The first occurrence of each duplicated observation shall be retained and all subsequent duplicates removed. The Date column shall be converted from object to datetime using the parameters supplied by the JSON contract, including the requested errors, format and UTC handling. After filtering and conversion the dataset shall be sorted in ascending chronological order using the Date column. The final dataset shall contain 5989 observations, four columns, zero duplicate observations, a datetime Date column and chronological ordering suitable for merge.py.
